title: Module 1.5: Engineering & Administrative Controls
subtitle: Hierarchy of Controls and Implementation
description: Master the hierarchy of laser safety controls from elimination to PPE. Learn to select, implement, and maintain engineering controls (interlocks, barriers, beam stops) and administrative controls (SOPs, training, signage). Features interactive control hierarchy exercise and virtual lab setup.
learning_objectives: Apply the hierarchy of controls to laser safety scenarios
Select appropriate engineering controls for laser classes
Implement proper signage and labeling requirements
Evaluate control effectiveness and maintenance requirements

badge.name: Control Systems Specialist
badge.description: Mastered laser safety control systems and implementation

research_alignment.adult_learning: Hands-on virtual lab for control implementation
research_alignment.retention_strategy: Interactive lab setup with immediate feedback
